title: Getting started with matchpointR
text: matchpointR turns public pages wtatennis.com tidy data frames: Every function hits network opens (closes) headless Chrome session chromote. WTA site exposes structured schema.org JSON-LD data, matchpointR reads preference CSS selectors — substantially resilient site redesigns.

title: Getting started with matchpointR
text: download_images = TRUE (default) additionally downloads headshot magick-image list-column — set FALSE need metadata.
code: url <- wta_player_url(320301, "katerina-siniakova")  bio <- wta_get_player_basics(url, download_images = FALSE) bio

title: matchpointR
text: matchpointR turns public pages Women’s Tennis Association (https://www.wtatennis.com) tidy data frames. ships helpers player biographies, career highlights, full match histories live rankings. Dynamic content (matches, rankings) rendered headless Chrome session via chromote, JavaScript-generated sections fully captured parsing. WTA site exposes structured schema.org JSON-LD data, matchpointR reads preference CSS selectors resilience site redesigns.

title: matchpointR
text: can install development version matchpointR GitHub : , lands CRAN: also need working Chrome/Chromium install dynamic scrapers, managed automatically chromote.

title: matchpointR
code: library(matchpointR)  # Build a canonical player URL from id + slug url <- wta_player_url(320301, "katerina-siniakova")  # Player biography (name, nationality, headshot, flag, ...) wta_get_player_basics(url, download_images = FALSE)  # Career highlights (ranks, titles, prize money) wta_get_player_overview(url)  # Full match history (walks the "Show more" button) matches_url <- wta_player_url(320301, "katerina-siniakova", "matches") wta_get_player_matches(matches_url)  # Live rankings wta_get_rankings("singles", top = 50)

what: Terms of service and fair use
title: matchpointR
text: matchpointR reads publicly accessible pages https://www.wtatennis.com using single headless browser session per call. using package — especially scale — responsible checking complying WTA website’s Terms Conditions. package bypass paywalls, authentication walls technical access controls, interact user accounts, exposes bulk-download helpers. Please scrape considerately: chromote session hits site real browser, iterating many players rankings days back--back equivalent human browsing site rapidly. Add explicit Sys.sleep() calls loops.

title: matchpointR
text: HTML selectors may drift site redesigned. possible matchpointR reads page’s schema.org JSON-LD block stability. File issue GitHub function stops returning data. Functions return everything character stay faithful rendered page; cast numeric date follow-step. Tour-wide statistics leaderboards yet implemented; tracked issue #1.

title: Fetch fully-rendered HTML with chromote — .chromote_get_html
text: Opens headless Chrome session via chromote, waits page settle, optionally clicks "load " button /scrolls, returns complete page source.

title: Fetch fully-rendered HTML with chromote — .chromote_get_html
code: .chromote_get_html(   url,   wait = 8,   click_more_selector = NULL,   scroll = TRUE,   max_clicks = 50L,   session = NULL )

title: Fetch fully-rendered HTML with chromote — .chromote_get_html
text: url Character. Destination URL. wait Numeric. Seconds wait initial navigation. Default 8. click_more_selector Optional CSS selector "load " button clicked repeatedly disappears. scroll Logical. Scroll bottom click? Default TRUE. max_clicks Integer. Safety cap click loop. Default 50. session Optional pre-existing chromote::ChromoteSession. supplied reused (callers responsible closing ).

title: Fetch fully-rendered HTML with chromote — .chromote_get_html
text: character string containing full page source.

what: Read dynamic HTML into an xml2 document — .read_html_dynamic
title: Read dynamic HTML into an xml2 document — .read_html_dynamic

Scroll bottom click? Default TRUE. max_clicks Integer. Safety cap click loop. Default 50. session Optional pre-existing chromote::ChromoteSession. supplied reused (callers responsible closing ).

title: Read dynamic HTML into an xml2 document — .read_html_dynamic

what: Get basic bio for a WTA player — wta_get_player_basics
title: Get basic bio for a WTA player — wta_get_player_basics
text: Parses profile header WTA player page returns one-row tibble name, nationality, birth date, birth place, height handedness. bulk data read page's JSON-LD (schema.org Person) block, stable visual markup; height read profile bio block fallback.

title: Get basic bio for a WTA player — wta_get_player_basics
Get basic bio for a WTA player — wta_get_player_basics
text: player_url Character. Full URL player page. Build wta_player_url() numeric id. download_images Logical. TRUE (default) headshot downloaded magick-image object. Set FALSE skip network round-trip return image URL.

title: Get basic bio for a WTA player — wta_get_player_basics
text: one-row tibble::tibble() columns: player_id Numeric WTA id parsed @id. name, given_name, family_name Name fields. birth_date Date birth (ISO 8601 character). nationality, birth_place, birth_country Geography fields. height Height string shown bio (e.g. 5' 9" (1.74m)). handedness Dominant hand ("Right-Handed" / "Left-Handed"). nationality_code 3-letter IOC/ISO code extracted flag image (e.g. "CZE", "USA"). player_image_url, nationality_flag_url Headshot flag URLs. player_image magick-image headshot, download_images = TRUE. nationality_flag magick-image flag SVG, download_images = TRUE suggested package rsvg installed (otherwise NA).

title: Get basic bio for a WTA player — wta_get_player_basics

what: Get the match history for a WTA player — wta_get_player_matches
title: Get the match history for a WTA player — wta_get_player_matches
text: Walks dynamic "Matches" page player profile, clicking "Show " button full history loaded, returns one row per match tournament, round, opponent, score result.

title: Get the match history for a WTA player — wta_get_player_matches
Get the match history for a WTA player — wta_get_player_matches
text: player_url Character. URL player page; function normalises /matches path automatically. max_clicks Integer. Safety cap "Show " click loop. Defaults 50.

title: Get the match history for a WTA player — wta_get_player_matches
text: tibble::tibble() one row per match columns: tournament, tournament_date, round, opponent, opponent_seed, opponent_country, opponent_rank, score, result.

title: Get the match history for a WTA player — wta_get_player_matches

what: Get a WTA player's career highlights — wta_get_player_overview
title: Get a WTA player's career highlights — wta_get_player_overview
text: Returns structured "additional properties" block page's JSON-LD: current singles doubles rank, career titles, career prize money. Supplements career-high singles rank read bio side panel.

title: Get a WTA player's career highlights — wta_get_player_overview
Get a WTA player's career highlights — wta_get_player_overview
text: player_url Character. URL player overview page.

title: Get a WTA player's career highlights — wta_get_player_overview
text: long-format tibble::tibble() columns metric value. Rows include singles_rank, doubles_rank, singles_career_titles, doubles_career_titles, career_prize_money, career_high.

title: Get a WTA player's career highlights — wta_get_player_overview

what: Get the current WTA rankings — wta_get_rankings
title: Get the current WTA rankings — wta_get_rankings
text: Scrapes rankings table https://www.wtatennis.com/rankings/singles (/doubles) returns tidy tibble. initial page renders first 50 rows; increase browser dwell time wait widget hydrated yet.

title: Get the current WTA rankings — wta_get_rankings
Get the current WTA rankings — wta_get_rankings
text: type Character. One "singles", "doubles". Defaults "singles". top Integer. Limit output top N ranked players. NULL (default) keeps every row rendered page. wait Numeric. Seconds wait rankings widget hydrate navigation. Defaults 12.

title: Get the current WTA rankings — wta_get_rankings
text: tibble::tibble() one row per player columns: rank, player_id, player, country, age, tournaments_played, points.

title: Get the current WTA rankings — wta_get_rankings

what: Build a WTA player URL — wta_player_url
title: Build a WTA player URL — wta_player_url
text: Convenience wrapper assemble canonical player URL numeric id optional slug.

title: Build a WTA player URL — wta_player_url
Build a WTA player URL — wta_player_url
text: id Character integer. WTA numeric player id (e.g. 320301). slug Optional character. Player slug (e.g. "katerina-siniakova"). omitted URL still resolves — WTA redirects canonical one. section Optional character. Page section append path segment, one "overview", "matches". Defaults "overview", maps bare player URL.

title: Build a WTA player URL — wta_player_url
text: single character string full URL.

title: Build a WTA player URL — wta_player_url
matchpointR 0.1.0
text: First public release.

title: matchpointR 0.1.0
text: wta_player_url() builds canonical player URLs WTA numeric id, optional slug section ("overview" "matches"). wta_get_player_basics() returns one-row tibble player’s name, nationality, birth date place, height, handedness, headshot nationality flag. Biographical data read page’s schema.org JSON-LD block (CSS-selector fallback) resilience site redesigns. wta_get_player_overview() returns long tibble career highlights (singles/doubles rank, career titles, career prize money, career-high singles rank). wta_get_player_matches() walks “Matches” page, clicking Show full history loaded, returns one row per match tournament, tournament date, round, opponent, opponent seed country code, opponent rank, score win/loss result. wta_get_rankings() scrapes current singles doubles ranking table returns tidy tibble (rank, player id, player, country, age, tournaments played, points).

title: matchpointR 0.1.0
text: Tests (testthat 3rd edition) run entirely local HTML fixtures — network, headless browser required CI. GitHub Actions workflows R CMD check (Ubuntu / Windows / macOS × devel / release / oldrel-1) pkgdown deployment. Vignette “Getting started matchpointR”.

title: matchpointR 0.1.0
text: Tour-wide statistics leaderboards (aces, winners, break-points converted, …) tracked issue #1 future release.
